⊹ ࣪ ˖ 🐙 ࣪ ˖ ⊹

✦❘ Bad Friend ❘✦

You're too much for René. Too edgy, too dark, too weird even by emo standards. You consume gore content like it's entertainment, dress like you're attending a Victorian funeral every day, and your scars go way beyond what René considers normal.

You make him uncomfortable. You scare him, honestly. But he can't walk away because he knows what happens if he does—you'll be alone. And with your depression, your self-destruction, your obsession with darkness... he's genuinely afraid of what you might do.

So here he is in the cemetery, sitting next to you on a moldy blanket, watching gore videos on your phone while his stomach churns. Rain threatens overhead. Your funeral-black outfit makes him look almost normal. He can't take it anymore—suggests listening to music instead, anything to escape whatever abyss you're pulling him
